messages.name: Bhai, Nana and Richa
messages.text:
Our Birthday wishes for Sambit

Many many Happy returns of the Day Sambit (Mamu) Wish you a very Happy Birthday 🎂 🥳 🎉..

May every moment of your special day be filled with the same joy and happiness you bring in others.

Keep being the loving, caring and kind person you are. May God shower you with endless blessings.

Have a memorable Birthday in Italy.
Happy birthday Sambit. Stay blessed
Warm birthday wishes with love from Anu and Parag.
Happy 50th Sambit! Cherishing these memories together.
A video shoutout from Archana, Leishu and Yuti.
Best wishes from Atul and family.
A special birthday greeting from Baby Nani.
Heartfelt wishes from Bapa.
Warm wishes from Kunmuni and Yatish.
A birthday video from Mama.
Happy birthday greetings from Sharad.
Wishes from Shweta and Dev.
Happy birthday greetings from Ajay.
Warm wishes from Beda.
Birthday wishes from Papun.
Happy birthday greetings from Suraj.
Heartfelt wishes from Dima Bhai.
Best wishes from Ranjit Pal and family.

messages.name: Nandini
messages.text:
🌺ଶ୍ରଦ୍ଧେୟ ସମ୍ବିତ‌ଙ୍କୁ ଜନ୍ମଦିନରେ ଶୁଭେଚ୍ଛା 🌺
ପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ ପ୍ରସାଦୁ ପଚାଶ ପାହାଚେ 
           ପକାଇଲ ତୁମେ ପାଦ
ଚଲାପଥ ତୁମ କୁସୁମିତ ହେଉ
             ‌କରୁଅଛୁ ଆଶୀର୍ବାଦ ।
ଅନ୍ନପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣା ଲାଗି କୁଟୀରକୁ ଆମ
            କରିଥିଲ ବିମଣ୍ଡିତ 
ମାନସପଟରେ ଝଟକି ସେ ଛବି 
           ମନହୁଏ ପୁଲକିତ ।
ସ୍ନେହ ମମତାରେ ବାନ୍ଧି ରଖିଅଛ
                 ସଭିଙ୍କୁ ନିଜର କରି
ବିପଦେ ଆପଦେ ବଢାଇଛ ହାତ 
                ବିଶ୍ୱାସ ଭରସା ଭରି ।
ଘରଠୁ ବାହାର ବନ୍ଧୁ ସାଙ୍ଗସାଥୀ 
             ଅଫିସ୍ କର୍ମ ସଂସ୍ଥାରେ 
ସବୁଠି ତୁମର ସୁନାମ ଶୁଣିକି 
            ସନ୍ତୋଷ ଲଭୁ ଅନ୍ତରେ ।
ଅର୍ଦ୍ଧ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀର ଜୀବନ ଯାତ୍ରାର 
             ସୁଦକ୍ଷ ଚାଳକ ତୁମେ 
ଦୀର୍ଘ ନିରାମୟ ଜୀବନ ତୁମର 
    ‌          କାମନା କରୁଛୁ ଆମେ ।
ଜନମଦିନରେ ପରିବାର ସାଥେ 
             ଯାଇଅଛ ତୀର୍ଥ କରି 
ନବୀନ ଉଲ୍ଲାସେ ବିତୁ ତୁମ ଦିନ 
            ସଭିଙ୍କ ଆଶୀଷ ଝରି ।
ପରମେଶ୍ବରଙ୍କୁ କରୁଛୁ ପ୍ରାର୍ଥନା 
            ଭକ୍ତିଭରା ଆବେଗରେ 
ଝଟକୁ ତୁମର ସୁଖର ସଂସାର 
           ପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ କୃପା ଦୃଷ୍ଟିରେ ।
🌺 ବାପା ଓ ମାମାଙ୍କ ଶୁଭାଶୀଷ ବାର୍ତ୍ତା 🌺🌺🌺🌺🌺

messages.name: Arpita & Priyank
messages.text:
Dear Sambit,

Happy 50th Birthday!

A milestone that deserves to be celebrated with all the warmth, laughter, care and love that you have so generously poured into the lives of everyone around you — and into ours, especially.

Over a decade of friendship has given us memories that will last a lifetime. From being neighbours to becoming family, the journey has been nothing short of beautiful. The trips we planned, the miles we covered, the long family lunches, the late evenings with beer mugs, and of course, those sips of chai — every moment has been precious.

What makes you even more special is that you never simply host — you care, you notice, you plan meticulously and go out of the way to make sure every person has the best of the time.

As you cross this magnificent milestone, our wish for you is simple and heartfelt — may the next fifty years bring you even more of everything that fills your heart. More open roads, more mountains, more of Leh and Ladakh (😊), more meals shared with family & friends, more travel stories that make us all lean in, more global throttling together, and more of joy, happiness and good health. You and Annapurna, feel so much like a second home!

With all our love, always —
Arpita & Priyank

messages.name: Hiya & Liam
messages.text: Happy Birthday, dear Sambit Uncle! You are the best in the whole world. The fresh baked breads, mouthwatering salads, special chicken curries and finger licking fish fries — nobody makes them like you do. Thank you for always knowing exactly what we like, for your care, and for making sure we are always happy when we are with you!!

messages.name: Saran
messages.text:
Dear Sambit,

Growing up with you was such a delight. You always brought your unique perspectives and topics to our discussions that were much different from what the rest of us had with the limited exposure of a Dhenkanal child of the 80s. That's how you earned the moniker as our "adbhutiya".

Your offbeat choices of hobbies and pastimes aligned differently for the rest of us, as your interest in gardening, nature, fishes, foreign science journals, rollerskates were so unlike than those of the rest of us.

Your endearing start-and-stop smile and the mischievous glint in your eyes (Gaurav has inherited the same glint in eyes from you) is something that comes to the mind when the memories of our childhood flash (due to the busy life such flashbacks have sadly become very rare).

In those wonder years when we were growing up together I reminisce our long talks on your terrace climbing the iron stairs at your home, our trips to the nearby joda, saptasajya picnics.

As you hit 50, wish you a much more adventurous and adbhut-bhara next 50. Happy birthday buddy!

Love,
Saran

messages.name: Srini, Vyjayanthi, Deekshu & Bablu
messages.text: Sambit - you are such a fascinating and wonderful person who cares for the family utmost and a big achiever in professional life. Wish you loads of birthday wishes on this special 50th birthday from all of us and wishing gala celebrations on this wonderful occasion.

messages.name: Anu & Papun
messages.text:
Happy 50th Birthday to Sambit bhai! May your special day be filled with love, laughter, and the company of family and friends who cherish you. Wishing you good health, happiness, and continued success in the years ahead. May this new chapter bring you countless blessings and unforgettable memories. 🎉🎊

~ Anu & Papun.

Special wishes from Rex - Happy Birthday Pisa ❤️

messages.name: Sugandha
messages.text:
Turning 50 comes with a special formula😜: 50% love from Annapurna 👩‍❤️‍👨 and 50% from everyone whose lives you've brightened ✨ over the years! Together that's 💯 % love.

Wishing you a fantastic 50th birthday 🎂 and a year ahead filled with every blessing and happiness 😊 you deserve 🌹. Enjoy your day to the fullest 🎉. Here's to 50 amazing years and many more wonderful ones ahead! 💐

Happy Birthday Sambit🎈
By Sugandha
